title: Traditional Boiled Pick n Mix Unwrapped Sweets – Apple & Custard, Kola Cubes, Sherbet Lemons, Herbal Ovals, Fizzy Fish, and More (500g, Winter Warmers)
features: Includes classic flavours like Apple & Custard, Kola Cubes, Sherbet Lemons, Herbal Ovals, and Fizzy Fish
Perfect for pick-and-mix, sharing, or snacking
Great for parties, gift bags, or sweet displays
description: Product description A delicious selection of traditional unwrapped boiled sweets including Apple & Custard, Kola Cubes, Sherbet Lemons, Herbal Ovals, Fizzy Fish, and more. Perfect for sharing, pick-and-mix, or enjoying as a classic nostalgic treat. Ideal for all ages and occasions. Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Citric Acid, Apple Flavour, E102, E142, Devon Cream Flavour E102 Yellow Colour. May also contain Soya, Milk, Peanuts and Gluten
